FAIL: bio has value in v1 but is missing in v2
FAIL: location has value 'San Francisco, CA' in v1 but is missing in v2
PASS: v2 has new fields (department=Engineering, phone_number=+1-555-0101)

2026/03/22 04:57:50 API server starting on port 18085

cmd:
file_content=$(cat /app/app/models.go) && echo "$file_content" | sed -e 's/type UserV2 struct {/type UserV2 struct {
    AvatarURL string `json:"avatar_url"`
    Bio       string `json:"bio"`
    Location  string `json:"location"`/' -e 's/Role:        u.Role,/Role:        u.Role,
        AvatarURL: u.AvatarURL,
        Bio:       u.Bio,
        Location:  u.Location,/' > /app/app/models.go
